betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Rolling Machine§f is a 2×5×3 multiblock (TileRollingMachine.java:17) that compresses §6ingots§f and §6double-ingots§f into §6plates§f at industrial scale — every AR metalworking pipeline leans on it. The frame is §6Structure Blocks§f with a §6Motor§f and a §6Machine Structure§f block in the middle row, a §6Power Plug§f ('P'), §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), §6Input Hatch§f ('I') and a §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5) on the top layer, plus three §6Steel Blocks§f ("blockSteel") on the right column and an §6Output Hatch§f ('O') and §6Lubricant Hatch§f ('L') for high-tier recipes.

§6Production Path (libVulpes RecipesMachine + TileRollingMachine.java)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Steel Gear§f (libvulpes:productgear:6), 1x §6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine), 1x §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), 1x §6Block of Iron§f (minecraft:iron_block), 1x §6Liquid IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:5)
- Power: 30 RF/t baseline; the 'L' hatch accepts §6lubricant§f to halve the per-tick cost on later recipes
- Recipes surface in JEI as §6Advanced Rocketry: Rolling Machine§f

The Rolling Machine replaces the hand-cranked §6Hammer§f plate recipes for AR-relevant metals and unlocks bulk steel, titanium and aluminum plates for the §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) and §6Vacuum Laser§f (10014) chains. Without it you cannot feasibly build a single rocket stage.

§eTip§f: The 'L' (Lubricant) hatch is optional for the initial recipes but becomes mandatory once you process §6titanium§f and §6titanium aluminide§f plates — pipe in §6creosote oil§f or §6lubricant§f to keep the machine running.
